---
title: "Memberships"
format: html
---

Digital Skills Training

Goals

1. Train learners on the basics of computational thinking. 

2. Promote the use of open-source tools (such as R/Python) to solve data analysis and visualization problems.

Organizations

1. [Certified Carpentries Instructor](https://carpentries.org/community/instructors/)

2. [Digital Research Academy](https://digital-research.academy/trainers/).
